# Taylored Mortgages

> Taylor LaPierre is a licensed mortgage advisor (NMLS #2068598) serving homebuyers, refinancers, and investors across Maine and New Hampshire through Acadia Lending Group, LLC (NMLS #370636).

Taylor specializes in personalized mortgage solutions — not one-size-fits-all products. She works with first-time buyers, move-up buyers, investors, self-employed borrowers, and homeowners looking to refinance. Her focus is on smooth closings, competitive rates, and genuine one-on-one guidance from application to keys.

## Services
- Home purchase loans (conventional, FHA, VA, USDA)
- Refinancing (rate-and-term, cash-out)
- Jumbo loans for luxury and coastal properties
- Construction loans
- Investment property financing
- First-time homebuyer programs (Maine Housing, NHHFA)

## Service Area
All of Maine and New Hampshire, with deep local expertise in:
- Portland, ME
- South Portland, ME
- Kennebunk & the Southern Maine Coast
- York & the Southern Maine Coast
- Portsmouth, NH
- The Lakes Region, NH

## Contact
- **Phone:** (207) 232-1918
- **Email:** tlapierre@acadialendinggroup.com
- **Office:** South Portland, Maine 04106

## Credentials
- Taylor LaPierre — NMLS #2068598
- Acadia Lending Group, LLC — NMLS #370636
- Licensed Mortgage Advisor in Maine and New Hampshire
- Equal Housing Lender
